complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Break down the 'Implement Blog with Markdown Support' task into subtasks covering: 1) MDX setup and configuration, 2) file-based routing system, 3) blog post layout with reading progress bar, 4) language support and fallback mechanism, and 5) front matter parsing and integration.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: This task involves multiple technical components including Markdown/MDX rendering, multilingual support, custom layout with animations, and file-based routing. The cyclomatic complexity would be moderate to high due to the language fallback logic and reading progress calculations. The task requires integration of multiple libraries (next-mdx-remote, gray-matter) and implementation of several interconnected features, suggesting a complexity score of 7.
